revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting potentially corrupted lower level templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ctime%3Ay here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ctime%3Ay for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#expr: {{#switch: {{#expr: ( {{#time:Y|{{{1|{{ctime}}}}}}} - 1905) mod 19}}
|1=24|2=42|3=32|4=21|5=39|6=28|7=47|8=36|9=25|10=44|11=33|12=22|13=41|14=30|15=49|16=38|17=27|18=45|35}}+{{#switch: {{#time:Y|{{{1|{{#time:Y|{{ctime}}}}}}}}}
|1985=29|2104=2
|1905|1925|1941|1958|1966|1977|1978|1994|1997|2001|2003|2013|2022|2029|2038|2039
|2041|2049|2057|2058|2061|2065|2073|2074|2077|2089|2090|2091|2092|2093|2098|2099=-1
|1907|1910|1911|1912|1919|1920|1923|1926|1928|1929|1930|1935|1936|1945|1948
|1952|1955|1956|1964|1968|1971|1972|1980|1983|1990|1991|1992|1999|2007|2008
|2018|2024|2043|2044|2052|2088|2103|2105|2106|2107|2108|2112|2113=1
|0 }}}}<noinclude>[[Category:Chinese traditional date templates]]
{{documentation|content=
== Examples ==
{{aligned table|class=wikitable|row1header=y
|Input | Output
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|+8hours}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|+8hours}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-1years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-1years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-4years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-4years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-7years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-7years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-10years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-10years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-13years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-13years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-16years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-16years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-19years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-19years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-22years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-22years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-25years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-25years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-28years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-28years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-31years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-31years}}}}
|{{tld|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-34years}}}}|{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|-34years}}}}
}}<templatedata>
{
	"description": "to get the date bias between the Chinese and Gregorian calendar",
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"aliases": [
				"d"
			],
			"label": "d",
			"description": "The date in the Gregorian Chinese calendar",
			"type": "date",
			"default": "today"
		}
	}
}
</templatedata>}}
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
